title: scutellaria tenuiflora
intro: Scutellaria tenuiflora, also known as skullcap, is a perennial herb native to eastern Asia, particularly in China and Korea. The medicinal properties of Scutellaria tenuiflora lie in its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of this herb include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes, as well as possessing anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Scutellaria tenuiflora can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to enhance cognitive function and boost the immune system.
